ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "time_hr" INTEGER /* Time in hours */,
  "demand_kw" REAL /* Energy demand in kW */,
  "solar_capacity_factor" REAL /* Solar capacity factor */,
  "wind_capacity_factor" REAL /* Wind capacity factor */,
  "dispatch_natgas_kw" REAL /* Dispatch natural gas in kW */,
  "dispatch_natgas_ccs_kw" REAL /* Dispatch natural gas with CCS in kW */,
  "dispatch_solar_kw" REAL /* Dispatch solar in kW */,
  "dispatch_wind_kw" REAL /* Dispatch wind in kW */,
  "dispatch_nuclear_kw" REAL /* Dispatch nuclear in kW */,
  "dispatch_to_storage_kw" REAL /* Dispatch to storage in kW */,
  "dispatch_from_storage_kw" REAL /* Dispatch from storage in kW */,
  "energy_storage_wh" REAL /* Energy storage in Wh */,
  "dispatch_to_pgp_storage_kw" REAL /* Dispatch to PGP storage in kW */,
  "dispatch_pgp_storage_kw" REAL /* Dispatch PGP storage in kW */,
  "energy_pgp_storage_wh" REAL /* Energy PGP storage in Wh */,
  "dispatch_unmet_demand_kw" REAL /* Dispatch unmet demand in kW */,
  "curtailment_solar_kw" REAL /* Curtailment solar in kW */,
  "curtailment_wind_kw" REAL /* Curtailment wind in kW */,
  "curtailment_nuclear_kw" REAL /* Curtailment nuclear in kW */,
  "price_usd_per_kwh" REAL /* Price in USD per kWh */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "solar_irradiance_wpm2" REAL /* Solar irradiance in watts per square meter */,
  "demand_forecast_kw" REAL /* Demand forecast in kW */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_hr")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the energy source */,
  "capacity_kw" REAL /* Capacity of the energy source in kW */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used by the energy source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the energy source (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy storage system */,
  "storage_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy storage system */,
  "capacity_wh" REAL /* Capacity of the energy storage system in Wh */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of energy storage system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the energy storage system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the energy storage system (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy storage system */,
  "max_charge_rate_kw" REAL /* Maximum charge rate in kW */,
  "max_discharge_rate_kw" REAL /* Maximum discharge rate in kW */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_dispatch" (
  "dispatch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy dispatch event */,
  "time_hr" INTEGER /* Time in hours */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "amount_kw" REAL /* Amount of energy dispatched in kW */,
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related energy trading event */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related system integration event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispatch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_dispatch_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_dispatch_trading_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_id") REFERENCES energy_trading ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_dispatch_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES system_integration ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast event */,
  "time_hr" INTEGER /* Time in hours */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed_mps" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "solar_irradiance_wpm2" REAL /* Solar irradiance in watts per square meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast event */,
  "time_hr" INTEGER /* Time in hours */,
  "forecasted_demand_kw" REAL /* Forecasted energy demand in kW */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_trading" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy trading event */,
  "time_hr" INTEGER /* Time in hours */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "amount_kw" REAL /* Amount of energy traded in kW */,
  "price_usd_per_kwh" REAL /* Price of energy in USD per kWh */,
  "buyer" TEXT /* Buyer of the energy */,
  "seller" TEXT /* Seller of the energy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration event */,
  "time_hr" INTEGER /* Time in hours */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_data" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Dashboard data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)
